data.body: B-UX review-plan PASS (blocking=0), claimed claude-bux. USER DIRECTIVE: B-UX requires USER VERIFICATION of the visual-editor UX before close (not auto-merge). Flow: implement → code-review subagent → Playwright E2E + screenshots → PAUSE for user UX review → close only after approval. Advisories: P9 file_impact set; P6 AC — will pin the create-criterion/prompt worked example + the front-end/server verification plan in the implementation.
